description:
REQ-030 Phase 1, item 2: The DaemonNotificationRuntime is production-quality (Webhook + SlackWebhook with retry, dead-letter, deduplication) but no proactive event types exist. Add new event types that can be subscribed to.

Changes needed:
1. Add new daemon event types in the event emission layer:
   - `stale-task-alert` — emitted when a task exceeds the stale threshold, includes task_id, title, age_hours, suggested_action
   - `idle-daemon` — emitted when a full tick finds zero work to do (no ready tasks, no active workflows)
   - `proactive-suggestion` — generic event for daemon-generated suggestions (extensible)
2. Emit `stale-task-alert` from stale_in_progress_summary() results during the tick (in emit_project_tick_summary_events or a new function)
3. Emit `idle-daemon` when project_tick returns a summary with all zeros
4. These events flow through existing DaemonNotificationRuntime — users can subscribe via webhook/slack configs
5. Add tests: verify events are emitted for stale tasks, verify idle event fires when no work exists

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_notifications.rs (event types, emission)
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs (tick summary events)
title: Add proactive daemon event types to notification system
